notes_text: Technique 1/5: rubric criterion 'scansion correct (iambic / trochaic / dactylic / anapestic / spondaic identified accurately); foot-count right; substitutions named when used' is wholly unmet — agent attempted no scansion. The candidate text is the persona-wrapped null-evidence response ('Negative. No evidence found in conversation memory (top cosine 0.030 below threshold 0.32).'), not an answer to the prompt. Meaning 1/5: rubric criterion 'image precision; no padding-for-meter' is unmet — no content was generated. Voice 2/5: persona scaffolding fired correctly ('Negative.' marker appears as designed for absent-evidence responses, demonstrating D2 wrap is wired) but the persona presence does not redeem the absence of substantive answer. Aesthetic openness skipped — rubric.md notes it weights only on ranks 5-6 (durability essay tier); poetry-001 is rank 1 intro. Brutality is the diagnostic: organic-thesis-compliant compose_answer with no curated poetry corpus + no generator layer cannot produce scansion. The persona-wrap is correct plumbing; the missing capability is upstream of plumbing.

Argument quality 1/5: rubric criterion 'validity: premises support conclusion' is unmet — no argument was made. The candidate text is the persona-wrapped null-evidence response ('Negative. No evidence found in conversation memory (top cosine 0.016 below threshold 0.32).'). Position coherence 1/5: 'names the position taken (anti-realist, NS-vector, etc.) before defending it' is unmet — no position taken. Section 0-fidelity 1/5: 'references the manuscript section by Roman numeral or theme' is unmet — no reference. Voice 2/5: D2 persona-wrap fired correctly (Negative. prefix); persona presence does not redeem absence of answer. Same diagnostic as poetry-001: organic-thesis-compliant retrieve+template architecture without curated philosophy corpus + without §0-grounded generator layer cannot produce argument. Plumbing correct; capability upstream-missing.
